profile:
NIFT-trained merchandiser with relevant experience in fashion buying, category management, and P&L ownership across retail and e-commerce. Built a women's casualwear category from zero, delivering ₹3.5L revenue in 2 months and improving margins from 22% to 35% through vendor negotiation and assortment optimization.

Proven ability to manage 200+ SKUs, improve sell-through by 15%, and expand assortments from 5 to 25+ subcategories by onboarding 12+ vendors. Experienced in PO/PI coordination, PLM workflows, and WIP tracking for bottom-wear, casualwear, and accessories across multi-channel environments.

Advanced Excel user (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, dashboards) with a data-driven approach to markdowns, replenishment, and sell-through analysis. While OTB management has been implicit within broader category ownership, rapid learning and commercial instinct enable quick formalization of OTB processes for fast-paced fashion cycles.

skills.label: Tools
items: Advanced MS Excel (VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables, Dashboards)

experience.description: Built the fashion category from near zero across online channels and a tech-enabled retail network of 3+ co-co stores, launching assortments across apparel, footwear, and accessories while driving vendor expansion, category P&L management, and data-led merchandising decisions.
bullets: Built a women's casualwear category from near zero to 25+ subcategories by onboarding 12+ regional vendors, identifying assortment gaps, and benchmarking against value retailers, delivering ₹3.5 lakh in revenue within two months.
Negotiated vendor pricing and MOQs to improve product margins from 22% to 35% while maintaining competitive retail pricing, demonstrating commercial acumen in margin optimization.
Analyzed weekly sales performance and customer demand signals to drive assortment rationalization, improving category gross margin by ~6% and reducing stock-outs by ~20% across priority SKUs.
Partnered with marketing to launch fashion-led campaigns during key festivals, increasing category visibility by ~22% and driving ~15% uplift in campaign sales.

Managed 200+ SKUs at Go Colors, improving sell-through by 15% through data-led replenishment and assortment adjustments, and launched 3+ new sub-categories including kids-wear, boosting category sales by 15% in the first quarter.

Built Excel-based WIP trackers and coordinated with 20+ suppliers across India and Asia, ensuring 95% on-time delivery for seasonal production orders and reducing post-launch return rates to under 10%.

experience.description: Built and operated a lean fashion reselling brand focused on affordable women's western-wear, managing end-to-end sourcing, merchandising, content creation, and customer engagement across Instagram and Swiggy Minis.
bullets: Operated a lean fashion brand generating ₹50,000 revenue in launch phase with zero returns, sourcing 60+ SKUs at 45% gross margins and reducing catalog errors by 90% through custom tracking systems.

experience.description: Supported buying and merchandising for women's and girls' bottom-wear categories including leggings, track pants, formal pants, ethnic bottoms, and shorts, with responsibility for vendor coordination, product lifecycle execution, and data-led assortment decisions.

education.details: Graduate Certificate in Fashion Management, Toronto, Canada

education.degree: National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT), Bachelor of Design
